category_sources: source_facts.description says GTK+ is a GUI toolkit; official GTK documentation describes Gtk as the GTK toolkit.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is gtk+ and version is 2.24.33; source_facts.source-archive path is gtk+/2.24, indicating the GTK+ 2 series.
docs_sources: Official GTK documentation site provides versioned GTK 2 API documentation at docs.gtk.org/gtk2/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official GTK 3 documentation lists the GTK source as https://gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/gtk/, the same upstream project for GTK source history.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says GUI toolkit; source_facts.version/source-archive identify GTK+ 2.24; official GTK docs identify Gtk as the GTK toolkit.
